# ziku

> A bi-directional dev environment template that evolves with you.

ziku is a CLI tool that syncs dev environment configuration files (CI workflows, linter configs, editor settings, etc.) between a template repository and multiple projects — bi-directionally.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://tktcorporation.github.io/ziku/guide/getting-started): How to set up and use ziku
- [How it Works](https://tktcorporation.github.io/ziku/guide/how-it-works): Architecture and design
- [Commands](https://tktcorporation.github.io/ziku/guide/commands): CLI command reference


## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/tktcorporation/ziku)
